---
title: "Digital Land: Data Center Announcements and the Capture of Community-Created Value in Georgia"
author: "Damian Krotov"
date: last-modified
format:
  pdf:
    number-sections: true
    fig-pos: "t"
bibliography: references.bib
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: load-results
import json
from pathlib import Path

res_path = Path("../output/results.json")
res = json.loads(res_path.read_text()) if res_path.exists() else {}
main = res.get("main", {})
mc = res.get("monte_carlo", {})

def pct(x, digits=1):
    """log points -> % for prose; returns TODO string when results are absent."""
    return f"{100 * x:.{digits}f}%" if isinstance(x, (int, float)) else "TODO_RUN_P3"
```

<!--
Every empirical number in this document is interpolated from output/results.json
(or refs/sources.md for institutional facts) — never hand-typed. If a value shows
TODO_RUN_P3, the estimation phase has not produced results yet.
Structure per CLAUDE.md P6; framing per ARCHITECTURE §12.
-->

# Introduction

<!-- Hook: the $26M land / $1.8B servers split from the DOAA audit; the question
"who captures the value when the cloud touches the ground?"; contributions:
(1) first Georgia evidence, (2) announcement-timing design, (3) hand-built
event dataset; preview of findings. -->

# Background: Georgia's data center boom and George's rent

<!-- §2 of ARCHITECTURE: exemption cost ~$2.5B FY2026 (DOAA audit), 9,985 MW
PSC certification ~80% data centers, failed 2026 bills, phantom-load evidence
(Exelon ~22%, E3 telemetry). Henry George: settler parable (quote checked
against primary text), land vs. capital, exemption as inverse-George,
speculation and socialized risk. Cite refs/sources.md items only. -->

# Data

<!-- D1 hand-built announcement events (n = `{python} main.get("n_treated_zips", "TODO_RUN_P3")`
treated ZIPs after verification); D2 Zillow ZHVI ZIP monthly smoothed SA;
D3 ZCTA polygons + ACS covariates; ZIP≈ZCTA caveat. Map + timeline figures
from output/events_qc.html analogs. -->

# Empirical strategy

<!-- Callaway–Sant'Anna group-time ATTs, not-yet-treated controls, doubly robust,
anticipation = 3; why static TWFE fails (Goodman-Bacon); ring-1 exclusion;
pre-committed hypotheses H1a/H1b/H0 (this file was committed to git before
estimation — cite commit hash). -->

# Results

The headline simple ATT on log home value is `{python} pct(main.get("att_simple"))`
(95% CI `{python} pct(main.get("ci_lo"))` to `{python} pct(main.get("ci_hi"))`),
across `{python} main.get("n_treated_zips", "TODO_RUN_P3")` treated ZIPs against
`{python} main.get("n_control_zips", "TODO_RUN_P3")` never/not-yet-treated controls.

![Event-study path of announcement effects](../output/figs/eventstudy.pdf)

# Robustness

<!-- Table from output/tables/robustness_table.html; placebo p-value; overlap plot. -->

# Who bears the risk that the value never arrives?

<!-- RQ2: stipulation mechanics; ILLUSTRATIVE Monte Carlo fan chart
(output/figs/stranded_fan.pdf); land value capture as remedy. -->

![ILLUSTRATIVE stranded-cost simulation](../output/figs/stranded_fan.pdf)

# Limitations

<!-- The seven items of ARCHITECTURE §7, verbatim in spirit: siting endogeneity,
date measurement error, ZIP aggregation masking hyperlocal effects, SUTVA,
scope, AI disclosure pointer. -->

# References
